tracks.title: Ride
tracks.one_liner: A restless anthem about breaking free from the weight of a broken world.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Road trip montage, rebel protagonist moment, season finale escape scene, pickup truck commercial
tracks.similar_artists: Tom Petty, Bruce Springsteen, The Wallflowers
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Kick it all to the curb time to get resurrected / Going to ride / Forget about your troubles 'cause we're going to get out of here and ride

tracks.title: Tangled in Translation
tracks.one_liner: Two people falling apart in the space between what they mean and what they say.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Couple arguing scene, therapy montage, relationship drama turning point, indie film dialogue break
tracks.similar_artists: Counting Crows, The Fray, Matchbox Twenty
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: The weight of words can color gray / The choices that we've made / And what we say

tracks.title: Cisco
tracks.one_liner: A working man's escape to a place where the fire, the music, and the people make everything right.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Campfire gathering scene, buddies road trip, rural Texas setting, whiskey brand commercial, family reunion montage
tracks.similar_artists: Robert Earl Keen, Cross Canadian Ragweed, Turnpike Troubadours
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: I'm going to Cisco to sit by the fire darling / I'm going to Cisco to sing with the band / When the weight of the world pushes down / We go to Cisco

tracks.title: Money See Monkey Do
tracks.one_liner: A biting takedown of viral fame culture and the absurd things people do for clicks.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Social media satire montage, reality TV scene, dark comedy, tech/influencer documentary
tracks.similar_artists: Beck, Cake, Barenaked Ladies
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Monkey see monkey do / You're almost famous dude / The beast feeds on blood / Humiliation too

tracks.title: The Push and Pull
tracks.one_liner: A love letter to staying together when everything else tries to pull you apart.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Wedding scene, couple's montage, family drama resolution, romantic comedy heart moment, anniversary commercial
tracks.similar_artists: John Mellencamp, Bryan Adams, Edwin McCain
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: The push and pull world can come between us / Everybody takes / And the paper tigers try to complicate / But your every way makes me want to stay

tracks.title: Polygraph 2
tracks.one_liner: A searing confrontation with someone who lies, manipulates, and never looks back.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Courtroom drama, political thriller, betrayal reveal, crime documentary, corporate whistleblower scene
tracks.similar_artists: Pearl Jam, U2, Alanis Morissette
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: And you stare right through me / As you play in your house of glass / You paint these walls with what you see / Polygraph, polygraph

tracks.title: 15 Minutes
tracks.one_liner: A sardonic meditation on everybody chasing their fifteen minutes while missing the point.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Behind-the-scenes showbiz drama, coming-of-age turning point, indie film montage, news media satire
tracks.similar_artists: R.E.M., The Wallflowers, Semisonic
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: The difference between the brave and the bold / One acts the story of the other's story told / Building castles in the air like a dream make-believe / 15 minutes of fame we need

tracks.title: Maddening Crowd
tracks.one_liner: Lovers seeking refuge from a world that promised more than it delivered.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Beach scene, couple eloping, romantic drama climax, wedding first dance, travel/resort commercial, period drama
tracks.similar_artists: Coldplay, Snow Patrol, The Verve
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Far from the maddening crowd / With oceans and Champaign / You said: let me help you to find your way

tracks.title: Goldfish
tracks.one_liner: A whimsical series of metaphors for a relationship going in circles with no way to win.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Romantic comedy montage, quirky indie film, dating app commercial, sitcom relationship arc
tracks.similar_artists: Paul Simon, Jason Mraz, Jack Johnson
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Hey, hey little goldfish / What are you going through? / And you and me are treading water / We both have little much to do

tracks.title: She Treats Her Body Like
tracks.one_liner: A raw portrait of a woman spiraling through bars and mornings, trying to fill the void with noise.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Character-driven indie drama, addiction storyline, gritty bar scene, late-night montage, documentary on mental health
tracks.similar_artists: Ryan Adams, The Black Keys, Lucinda Williams
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: She treats her body like she was on fire / She jumps from a little higher

tracks.title: Catalyst (to the 7)
tracks.one_liner: A parent watching their child wake up to the cold real world, wishing they could still fix it with a kiss.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Child leaving home scene, parenting drama, coming-of-age transition, graduation montage, family insurance/brand commercial
tracks.similar_artists: Bruce Springsteen, Bob Seger, John Mayer
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: You're awake now / I can no longer fix things with a kiss / You're awake now / What drives you as you walk out into this cold new day

tracks.title: Suzanne
tracks.one_liner: A sharp, self-aware goodbye where the narrator volunteers to play the villain so she can keep her story.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Post-breakup scene, character walking away, dramedy relationship fallout, end credits song
tracks.similar_artists: Matchbox Twenty, Gin Blossoms, The Goo Goo Dolls
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Ask me and I'll be your villain / You be the martyr with a broken heart / You're well-rehearsed for that part

tracks.title: Dirt Floor Camelot
tracks.one_liner: A love song to living large in a small house -- no castle needed when you've got each other.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Blue-collar love story, small-town romance, dancing-in-the-kitchen scene, home improvement commercial, family sitcom heart moment
tracks.similar_artists: Zac Brown Band, Chris Stapleton, Jason Isbell
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Our dirt floor Camelot / Yea girl, we're far from Shangri La / No big ass castle, ain't got a lot / Just our dirt floor Camelot

tracks.title: You Bide Your Time
tracks.one_liner: A gentle push to stop holding on to hurt and start living before time runs out.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Recovery montage, funeral/memorial scene, character turning point, grief counseling, hospice/healthcare ad
tracks.similar_artists: Ray LaMontagne, The Lumineers, Brandi Carlile
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: You Bide Your Time searching for something / Something just from reach / Don't hold so tight to all of this hurting / There's no more waiting, no more waiting for me

tracks.title: Lockhart
tracks.one_liner: An outsider who found home in a small Texas town where everyone's welcome and everyone's known.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Small-town establishing scene, character arriving in new town, Texas tourism ad, community documentary, real estate brand
tracks.similar_artists: James Taylor, John Prine, Todd Snider
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Where everyone's welcome / Yeah everyone's known / Lockhart's our home

tracks.title: Helicopters and Horses
tracks.one_liner: A soldier's-eye gratitude song that questions war while honoring those who serve far from home.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Military homecoming, Veterans Day tribute, war documentary, patriotic montage, memorial service, military family ad
tracks.similar_artists: Bruce Springsteen, Steve Earle, John Mellencamp
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: I believe in country / And that we'll find our way / But far, far from our family's porches / Helicopters and Horses

tracks.title: Peace, Salam, Shalom
tracks.one_liner: A prayer for peace across every language, written from hospital halls and battlefields of the heart.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Peace rally scene, hospital bedside, interfaith documentary, humanitarian campaign, end-of-war scene, NGO ad
tracks.similar_artists: U2, Peter Gabriel, Eddie Vedder
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: On and on I'll hang on to / Hang on to a version of you / Can you let it go / Peace, Salam, Shalom

tracks.title: Another Perfect Day
tracks.one_liner: A love song disguised as a lazy Saturday where nothing happens and everything is perfect.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Morning routine montage, couple's lazy weekend, coffee brand ad, lifestyle commercial, rom-com B-roll, closing credits feel-good
tracks.similar_artists: Jack Johnson, Ben Folds, Matt Nathanson
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Crazy, Saturday / Nothing really happened much today / Lazy, you and me / It's simply just another perfect day

tracks.title: When You Come Home
tracks.one_liner: A parent's blessing to children leaving home -- and a promise the door is always open.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Wedding scene, military homecoming, graduation, family reunion, birth of grandchild, greeting card/family brand ad
tracks.similar_artists: John Prine, James Taylor, The Avett Brothers
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: From highlands 'to gate / Know we shall wait / For you to come home / From sage to snow / Whether whither or grow / Remember from where you came

tracks.title: Forever and a Day
tracks.one_liner: A quiet meditation on wanting to live forever but knowing love is what actually lasts.
tracks.scene_suggestions: End-of-life scene, elderly couple montage, hospital drama, anti-aging brand (tasteful), memorial tribute, indie film climax
tracks.similar_artists: Coldplay, Damien Rice, Iron & Wine
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Who wants to live forever / Who wants to live forever / Forever and a Day

tracks.title: Norman Rockwell
tracks.one_liner: The Norman Rockwell painting cracks open to reveal the American dream is really a scream.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Americana satire, suburban unraveling scene, dark comedy, political drama, documentary on American culture
tracks.similar_artists: Matchbox Twenty, Counting Crows, The Wallflowers
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Americana painting / Apple pie so real / Now here's your star / Norman Rockwell nightmare / American dream / Now that's a scream

tracks.title: Let The Day Begin
tracks.one_liner: A toast to every dreamer, worker, soldier, and stranger -- the anthem humanity deserves.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Opening montage, inspirational documentary, Olympics/sports promo, community campaign, charity gala, season premiere opener
tracks.similar_artists: The Call, U2, Simple Minds
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Here's to the babies of the brand new world / Here's to beauty of the stars / Here's to the travelers on the open roads / Here's to the dreamers at the bars

tracks.title: If I Could
tracks.one_liner: A man whispering to the ghost of a love he can't release, no matter how hard he tries.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Post-breakup reflection, late-night drive, lost love montage, indie romance, whiskey brand ad
tracks.similar_artists: Chris Stapleton, Ryan Adams, Patty Griffin
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Hear me whisper, soft and low / 'If I could, I'd let you go' / But I can't just let you go

tracks.title: Somebody Somewhere
tracks.one_liner: Everybody's got a broken story -- cowboy up, pull the curtains back, and let the good pour in.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Underdog montage, recovery storyline, community rally, anti-bullying campaign, charity ad, sports comeback
tracks.similar_artists: John Mellencamp, Tom Petty, Bon Jovi
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Don't let them cut you down, my friend / Break it down, cowboy up and try again / Pull those curtain back and let the good pour in

tracks.title: Heart, Boots, and Soul
tracks.one_liner: A boot-stomping, sawdust-kicking anthem that dares you to get loud and never let them bring you down.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Honky-tonk bar scene, dance montage, boot brand commercial, country music festival promo, line dance scene, truck ad
tracks.similar_artists: Brooks & Dunn, Eric Church, Midland
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Fill your boots / Kick the saw dust up now won't you / Jump back, find that, 2-step / Feed your soul / Never let them ever bring you down

tracks.title: Bottle Rocket Sunsets
tracks.one_liner: A grown man's ache for those childhood summers of creek chairs, freckles, and a princess who was his moon and sun.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Childhood flashback, summer nostalgia montage, coming-of-age film, family vacation ad, 4th of July scene, memoir documentary
tracks.similar_artists: John Prine, Tyler Childers, Sturgill Simpson
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Take me back to my boyhood when we were young / My childhood princess you were my moon and sun

tracks.title: Judge's Son
tracks.one_liner: A condemned man born on the wrong road who never had a soul to show him right from wrong.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Crime drama, courtroom scene, outlaw character intro, Southern Gothic film, true crime documentary, prison storyline
tracks.similar_artists: Johnny Cash, Chris Stapleton, Colter Wall
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: They call him the judge's son / No-one-ever-taught him what's good, what's right, what's wrong

tracks.title: I Wish You Well
tracks.one_liner: The most graceful goodbye ever written -- no regrets, no complaints, just lay me to rest next to you.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Funeral scene, character departure, end-of-series finale, farewell montage, hospice/palliative care ad, eulogy moment
tracks.similar_artists: James Taylor, Willie Nelson, Kris Kristofferson
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Can't complain, no regrets / Where we're going I ain't been yet / I wish you well

tracks.title: Tip The Band
tracks.one_liner: The anthem for every broke band in a broke-down van who plays all night for the love of it.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Band on the road, live music venue scene, music documentary, instrument brand ad, music festival promo, backstage comedy
tracks.similar_artists: The Hold Steady, Old 97's, Drive-By Truckers
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Don't forget to tip the band / Stomp your feet, clap your hands / We'll play all night, if in we can

tracks.title: 'Morrows' New Day Sun
tracks.one_liner: A father's lullaby promising the world can wait until tomorrow's sun.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Bedtime scene, newborn montage, children's product ad, baby brand commercial, parenting documentary, nursery scene
tracks.similar_artists: James Taylor, Norah Jones, Iron & Wine
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: So little one / You must be brave / And try to fall asleep / Daddy's here, Mommy's near / You're safe and sound with me

tracks.title: Our Last Days Together
tracks.one_liner: A promise that the last chapter will be the best one -- names in the sand, wine in hand, grand to the end.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Elderly couple scene, retirement montage, end-of-life love story, anniversary celebration, wedding vow scene, life insurance ad
tracks.similar_artists: Elton John, Billy Joel, Rod Stewart
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Our last days together will be grand / We'll draw our names in the sand / We'll take our time and sip our wine

tracks.title: Tiger Town
tracks.one_liner: A haunted Southern town where weddings stop trains and epitaphs welcome you to die.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Southern Gothic opening, small-town mystery, True Detective-style scene, character arriving in strange town, literary drama
tracks.similar_artists: Drive-By Truckers, Jason Isbell, Townes Van Zandt
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Ease the whip from off these horses pull the reins back off the ledge / You draw a line through crooked courses / To the place where you belong

tracks.title: Heaven and Wine
tracks.one_liner: A slow-burn seduction from screen doors to houseboats to moonshine -- heaven and wine, perfectly paired.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Romantic seduction scene, riverboat setting, Southern romance, bourbon/wine brand ad, steamy drama, bayou scene
tracks.similar_artists: Chris Isaak, Leon Bridges, Hozier
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Take out my heart and give me rest / Take out my lungs you steal my breathe / Too late too late to change me

tracks.title: Anything
tracks.one_liner: A man who came home too drunk and too late, begging to be anything she needs before she walks out.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Morning-after argument, relationship on the brink, character hitting rock bottom, dramedy turning point, rehab storyline
tracks.similar_artists: Matchbox Twenty, Hozier, Gary Clark Jr.
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: Everyone here knows why you're leaving / Everyone including me / It's not too late to say you're sorry / Let me be your anything

tracks.title: Did Van Gough Start Out This Way
tracks.one_liner: A fool in love making grand impossible promises -- wondering if even Van Gogh started this crazy.
tracks.scene_suggestions: Romantic comedy climax, grand gesture scene, artist biopic, art gallery scene, love letter montage, quirky indie romance
tracks.similar_artists: The Shins, Death Cab for Cutie, Wilco
tracks.lyrics_excerpt: The party's fading but the picture's clear / What a fool I make on these worn out stairs / But still you stay and we complicate / Did Van Gough start out this way?
